text:
Once upon a time, there was a little old house floating on the water. It was called Dewdrop Cottage, and it had glittering moonlight windows. Every night, magical fireflies would visit Dewdrop Cottage.

Inside the cottage lived an unusual old woman who loved to tell whimsical stories. She'd weave tales so vibrant, you'd feel as though you could float on the breeze.

One moonlit night, an adventurous young fox trotted by the water's edge. He heard tales of Dewdrop Cottage from wise old owls and daring rabbits who swam there. The fox wondered what kind of place might defy gravity and charm fireflies.

Curiosity driving him, the fox embarked on a nighttime adventure. He darted across the moonlit wetlands, hopping over lily pads and skipping across shining puddles.

As he approached Dewdrop Cottage, the fox beheld no ordinary house. Instead, he saw a giant phoenix rising from a lake of starlight. Phoenix feathers glowed
